name: Puppet Shark
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－パペット・シャーク
desc:
Detach 1 material from a monster on either field, and if you do, excavate the top 4 cards of your Deck, choose 1 of them, and apply the appropriate effect based on its card type, also place the rest on top of the Deck in the same order.
● Monster/Spell: Add it to your hand.
● Trap: Set it. It can be activated this turn.
You can only activate 1 "Puppet Shark" per turn.
eff:
Detach 1 material from a monster on either field, and if you do, excavate the top 4 cards of your Deck, choose 1 of them, and apply the appropriate effect based on its card type, also place the rest on top of the Deck in the same order.
● Monster/Spell: Add it to your hand.
● Trap: Set it. It can be activated this turn.
You can only activate 1 "Puppet Shark" per turn.

action: Places excavated cards on the top of the Deck
Adds excavated cards to the hand
mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
